name: System Network Connections Discovery
description: Detects enumeration of network connections on a host
query:
// Detect network connection enumeration
// Trigger on netstat, ss, or Get-NetTCPConnection
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(netstat\s+-[anop]|ss\s+-[ltunp]|Get-NetTCPConnection|Get-NetUDPEndpoint)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 2
within 120 seconds
